snapshot_id.description: The snapshot this observation belongs to.

rel_path.description: The canonical relative path within the root.

abs_path_hint.description: Optional hint for the absolute path.

size_bytes.description: The apparent/logical file length in bytes (stat.st_size).

is_symlink.description: Whether the file is a symlink.

is_text.description: Optional boolean indicating text content. Guaranteed only in content-enabled scans.

is_huge.description: Optional boolean indicating whether the file size exceeded max_file_size during scan. When true, content analysis is typically skipped due to size constraints; as a result, content-enrichment fields (e.g. mime_type, is_text, encoding, line_count, quick_hash) may be absent.

allocated_size_bytes.description: Filesystem blocks allocated to the file in bytes when available; otherwise falls back to size_bytes.

is_sparse.description: True when apparent size is greater than allocated_size_bytes.
